## Checklist

- [ ] `npm run typecheck`, `npm run lint`, and `npm test` pass
- [ ] If I touched the UI, I verified both locales (English and es-419)
- [ ] I updated `CHANGELOG.md` under `[Unreleased]` if this change is user-facing
